title: syzygium viriosum
intro: Syzygium viriosum, also known as the Malabar Neem or Malabar Thorn, is a plant species native to the Western Ghats of India and parts of Sri Lanka. It is a small, evergreen tree with thorny branches, valued for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The herbal preparations of Syzygium viriosum include teas, infusions, and topical applications, which are used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
